statement.markdown: Given an array of integers, implement a function that heapifies the array into a max heap. The function should then return the array without modifying the original array.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be an array of integers.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the original array heapified into a max heap.
statement.notes: Do not modify the original array.

examples.explanation: The array is heapified into a max heap.
The array is heapified into a max heap.

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution {public:    vector<int> heapify(vector<int>& nums){        if(nums.size() > 0){            for(int i=0; i<nums.size(); i++){                maxHeapify(nums, i);            }        }        return nums;    }    void maxHeapify(vector<int>& nums, int i){        int leftChild = 2*i + 1;        int rightChild = 2*i + 2;        int largest = i;        if(leftChild < nums.size() && nums[leftChild] > nums[largest]){            largest = leftChild;        }        if(rightChild < nums.size() && nums[rightChild] > nums[largest]){            largest = rightChild;        }        if(largest != i){            swap(nums[i], nums[largest]);            maxHeapify(nums, largest);        }    }};

buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution:    def heapify(self, nums):        if(len(nums) > 0):            for i in nums:                self.maxHeapify(nums, i)        return nums    def maxHeapify(self, nums, i):        leftChild = 2*i + 1        rightChild = 2*i + 2        largest = i        if(leftChild < len(nums) and nums[leftChild] > nums[largest]):            largest = leftChild        if(rightChild < len(nums) and nums[rightChild] > nums[largest]):            largest = rightChild        if(largest != i):            nums[i], nums[largest] = nums[largest], nums[i]            self.maxHeapify(nums, largest)
buggyStarterCode.javascript: function heapify(nums) {    if(nums.length > 0){        for(var i=0; i<nums.length; i++){            maxHeapify(nums, i);        }    }    function maxHeapify(nums, i){        var leftChild = 2*i + 1;        var rightChild = 2*i + 2;        var largest = i;        if(leftChild < nums.length && nums[leftChild] > nums[largest]){            largest = leftChild;        }        if(rightChild < nums.length && nums[rightChild] > nums[largest]){            largest = rightChild;        }        if(largest != i){            swap(nums[i], nums[largest]);            maxHeapify(nums, largest);        }    }

solutions.python: class Solution:    def heapify(self, nums):        if(len(nums) < 2):            return nums        for i in range(len(nums)//2 - 1, -1, -1):            self.maxHeapify(nums, i)        return nums    def maxHeapify(self, nums, i):        leftChild = 2*i + 1        rightChild = 2*i + 2        largest = i        if(leftChild < len(nums) and nums[leftChild] > nums[largest]):            largest = leftChild        if(rightChild < len(nums) and nums[rightChild] > nums[largest]):            largest = rightChild        if(largest != i):            nums[i], nums[largest] = nums[largest], nums[i]            self.maxHeapify(nums, largest)    def main(self):        nums = [4, 10, 3, 6, 2, 8, 1]        print(self.heapify(nums))
solutions.cpp: class Solution {public:    vector<int> heapify(vector<int>& nums){        if(nums.size() < 2){            return nums;        }        for(int i=nums.size()/2 - 1; i >= 0; i--){            maxHeapify(nums, i);        }        return nums;    }    void maxHeapify(vector<int>& nums, int i){        int leftChild = 2*i + 1;        int rightChild = 2*i + 2;        int largest = i;        if(leftChild < nums.size() && nums[leftChild] > nums[largest]){            largest = leftChild;        }        if(rightChild < nums.size() && nums[rightChild] > nums[largest]){            largest = rightChild;        }        if(largest != i){            swap(nums[i], nums[largest]);            maxHeapify(nums, largest);        }    }    vector<int> solve(){        vector<int> nums = {4, 10, 3, 6, 2, 8, 1};        vector<int> copy = nums;        return heapify(copy);    }};
